title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 7.1h
paragraphs: SERAPHINE BUFF: W healing ratio 5%→6%. R charm duration 1/1.25/1.5s → 1.25/1.5/1.75s.
SKARNER BUFF: Base AD per level 3.5→4. Base HP per level 120→128. Base HP regen 6→9. Passive max HP% damage 9%→10%; slow 40%→45%. W slow 20%→25%.
GNAR BUFF: Passive HP gain 100-850→100-900; Armor 4-55→5-60; MR 4-65→5-70. W max HP damage 6/8/10/12%→7/9/11/13%.
SONA BUFF: W healing 25/40/55/70→45/60/75/90. E self movement speed 10/11/12/13%→15/16/17/18%.
NUNU & WILLUMP NERF: Q damage ratio 6%→5%; Q HP regen ratio 12%→10%. E snowballs 10/14/18/22→8/12/16/20.
NAUTILUS NERF: W monster damage 200%→125%; W shield ratio 13/14/15/16%→9/10/11/12%. E monster damage 175%→125%.
TALIYAH NERF: Base movement speed 355→350. Passive movement speed 10/15/25/40%→5/10/20/35%. Q cooldown reduction 50%→30%.
ARAM: Standard surrender vote initiation 9min→7min. Vote passage changed to 70% approval threshold.
BUG FIX: Fixed Quicksilver Enchant interaction with Thresh Q and Nami Q CC effects.
